content.en:
The body of the Dragon Scale Overlord is the Void Dragon Scale Fish, an extremely rare creature in the Voidless Galaxy, relying on a long period of cultivation, it has grown to a high-level immeasurable life form, and it is infinitely close to the third stage, only half a step away from condensing immeasurable blood.

In terms of strength, the Dragon Scale Overlord is a little more powerful than the Void Whale Overlord, and the Dragon Scale Overlord's defense is extremely terrifying, so the Dragon Scale Overlord is enough to rank among the many overlords in the Voidless Galaxy.

"Void Whale Overlord, you haven't recovered from your injuries yet, and you actually came to me!"

The Dragon Scale Overlord appeared, looking at the Void Whale Overlord with some surprise.

And the Void Whale Overlord directly expressed his intention: "Dragon Scale Overlord, you have a lot of Hailou Gold in your hands, right?"

"It's true that there is a lot of Hailou Gold, what, you want Hailou Gold, that thing doesn't help you and me much!" said the Dragon Scale Overlord.

"I'm going to buy some Hailou gold, are you willing to sell it?"

The Void Whale Overlord said.

"How much do you want? If it's too much, I definitely won't sell it, after all, the Hailou Gold is useless to me, but it is very useful for the high-level immeasurable lifeforms in the first stage! "Dragon Scale Overlord.

"I need more than a few hundred thousand yuan, in short, the more the better!" said the Void Whale Overlord.

"So much!"

The dragon scale overlord was taken aback, you must know that even if he has a lot of Hailou gold, it is only a few million yuan, and some of the Hailou gold is still in the Hailou gold vein, and it has not been mined.

The Hailou Gold he kept in his hand was actually only more than one million yuan, and the Void Whale Overlord wanted hundreds of thousands of Hailou Gold in one breath, which was too much!

"What are you going to exchange for, ordinary things are of no value to me, I won't exchange them for Hailou Gold!" the Dragon Scale Overlord said clearly.

"Blue Water Divine Gold, how's that?"

The Void Whale Overlord said.

"Blue Water God Gold?" the dragon scale overlord thought for a moment and said, "It's indeed a good thing, but I also have this thing, and I don't lack it, so I won't change it!"

The Void Whale Overlord said a few more treasures, but the Dragon Scale Overlord was still unwilling to change.

In desperation, the Void Whale Overlord had no choice but to take out Hailou Tianjin: "Hailou Tianjin, you need this, I'll exchange it for it!"

"Hailou Tianjin !!"

The dragon scale overlord was shocked.

He knew very well that the Void Whale Overlord also needed Hailou Tianjin.

At present, in the Voidless Galaxy, many overlords are still in the second stage, and they have not condensed immeasurable blood so far, and they are all working hard to collect Hailou Tianjin.

Although he didn't know how much Hailou Tianjin was on the Void Whale Overlord, he definitely hadn't gathered it yet, otherwise the Void Whale Overlord would have condensed immeasurable blood a long time ago.

Similarly, he didn't get it together, but it wasn't too far away, and he probably needed a few hundred pieces of Hailou Heavenly Gold to get enough Hailou Heavenly Gold to help him hit the third stage.

However, Hailou Tianjin is still rare, and every overlord needs Hailou Tianjin.

Unless he kills an overlord and robs the opponent's Hailou Tianjin, it will be possible to get it together.

However, it is not easy for any overlord to kill, even if it is a weak state of the Void Whale Overlord, he still has the means to die together.

So, this path simply doesn't work.

"Void Whale Overlord, you can't go crazy, trade Hailou Tianjin for Hailou Gold, you are going to give up condensing immeasurable blood???" The Dragon Scale Overlord was shocked.

The Void Whale Overlord didn't speak, he wouldn't reveal Ye Tian's existence, otherwise the Dragon Scale Overlord would directly trade with Ye Tian, how could he trade from Ye Tian to get more Hailou Tianjin!

"Dragon Scale Overlord, will you do this deal?"

The Void Whale Overlord asked.

"Do!"

The dragon scale overlord is not stupid, such a good thing falls on him, and he is naturally happy.

"How about a piece of Hailou Tianjin for 30,000 Hailou gold?"

Void Whale Overlord Dao.

The price that Ye Tian gave him, he directly tripled, so that he still had something to earn.

Moreover, he believes that the dragon scale overlord is absolutely willing to make such a deal.

"Really?" said the Dragon Scale Overlord excitedly.

He excavated all the Hailou gold in the Hailou gold vein, and he could gather a total of several million pieces of Hailou gold, and according to the price of the Void Whale Overlord, he could exchange it for more than a hundred Hailou Tianjin.

If the Void Whale Overlord is still willing to continue trading, he will find a way to get more Hailou Gold, and he will be able to gather the Hailou Heavenly Gold that he needs to condense immeasurable blood.

At that time, he will be able to directly break through to the third stage of the high-level immeasurable lifeform, and his strength will be drastically improved!

"Really!"

The Void Whale Overlord nodded.

"Okay, then let's trade now!"

The Dragon Scale Overlord hurriedly said.

"I'll only trade you thirty pieces of Hailou Heavenly Gold first!" The Void Whale Overlord was also afraid that Ye Tian would run away, so his transaction would fail.

Therefore, it was impossible for him to touch his own Hailou Tianjin, and only took out thirty of the fifty-three Hailou Tianjin obtained from the previous transaction with Ye Tian to trade with the Dragon Scale Overlord.

"Thirty dollars, yes!"

The dragon scale overlord did not dislike less, for him, a piece of sea building gold is precious.

Soon, the Void Whale Overlord and the Dragon Scale Overlord completed the deal.

......

The other side.

Ye Tian fused the Hailou Gold obtained from the transaction one by one into Hailou Tianjin, and immediately obtained a large amount of Hailou Tianjin.

"Next, it's up to the Void Whale Overlord to bring me how much sea house gold he can bring!"

Ye Tian smiled.

It didn't take long for him to receive a summons from the Overlord of the Void Whale.

So, he immediately went to the Void Whale Mountain to make a second deal with the Void Whale Overlord.

This time, he used one hundred pieces of Hailou Heavenly Gold to trade one million pieces of Hailou Gold from the Void Whale Overlord.

Immediately, the two parties agreed to continue the transaction later.

In this way, as time passed, Ye Tian made many transactions with the Void Whale Overlord, and a total of tens of millions of sea building gold were traded, and what he paid was only thousands of sea building gold.

You must know that he has so much Hailou Gold that can be fused with nearly one million Hailou Tianjin, compared with the Hailou Tianjin he paid, he simply made a lot of money!!!

And the Void Whale Overlord was also very excited, because he had earned a lot of Hailou Heavenly Gold from it, and he had already gathered the Hailou Heavenly Gold that had condensed immeasurable blood, and he only needed to wait for his injuries to recover.

However, at this time, Ye Tian announced that he would no longer trade with the Void Whale Overlord in a short period of time, because he had already sensed the aura of many nearby Overlords.

Obviously, the Void Whale Overlord has acquired Hailou Gold from other overlords many times, and it has already attracted the attention of other overlords, and they have begun to investigate.

"Wait for the next time there is a shortage of Hailou gold, and then come to the empty galaxy to trade here!"

Ye Tian decided.
